request: crypto wallet landing page needs a clearer hero and trust path
currentIssue: The first screen is likely asking visitors to decode the product before they see the outcome, proof, and next step.

hero.headline: Turn crypto visitors into qualified actions faster
hero.subheadline: Clarify the offer, remove trust friction, and show exactly what happens after the first click.

sections.title: Outcome first
sections.copy: Lead with the business result visitors can understand in five seconds, then support it with product mechanics.

sections.title: Trust path
sections.copy: Explain what users share, what they keep control of, and which proof points make the decision feel safe.

sections.title: Action flow
sections.copy: Use one primary CTA, a short expectation-setting line, and a second proof point directly beside the action.

conversionNotes: Move the strongest quantified proof above the first scroll.
Replace abstract category language with a concrete user action.
Put risk-reducing copy next to the primary CTA, not only in the FAQ.
riskControls: No guaranteed revenue, ranking, token-price, or investment claims.
Keep compliance-sensitive wording factual and verifiable.
Use user-control language when payments, wallets, or personal data are involved.
